problem.title: The current frontline is fragile
problem.body: Manual QA cannot keep up with the release velocity. Regressions leak into production and break trust.
solution.title: Your autonomous QA operator
solution.body: Capitão Diff executes repeatable browser missions and reports objective approval signals.
how.title: How it works
how.step1: Analyze branch diff and detect risky UI surfaces.
how.step2: Run realistic user flows with Playwright.
how.step4: Post approval or rejection directly to pull requests.
feature.1.title: Regression Shield
feature.1.body: Blocks merges when objective risk indicators are detected.
feature.2.title: Browser Intelligence

feature.4.body: Comments, approves or rejects pull requests automatically.
